personas.name: Multilingual User
personas.description: Recent immigrant, expriancing high stress due to resetlemnet looking for mental health support in her native language.
goals: Use the app in her native language to better understand the content
pain_points: App is only available in english
No language change setting is available
context: Recently immigrant, trying to adjust with a new culture and langueage, needs a translated version of the app to better understand the content
constraints: All UI elements, prompts, and content must be fully translated
Language selection must be available during onboarding and persist throughout the experience

personas.name: Budget-Conscious User
personas.description: A University student recently moved out of his parents house, with a part time job dealing with academic pressure.
goals: Access mental health support without having to pay
Understanding what is free and what is paid before investing time.
pain_points: Useful insights and features are becomeing blocked behind a paywall
With high amount of work he has, spending time steing up an account that he later on knows he needs to pay for to accces features is frustrating
context: Download the app and answered the questions for a few days.
Using the app just to log in his mood daily with out finding out any usefull information about how to improve.
constraints: Core mental health support featues must be accessable without payment
Users must know about pricings before commeting time.

personas.name: Notification-Dependent User
personas.description: A user who relies notifications to remeber her daily mood logs
goals: Receive notifications to log mood at an appropriate time
Maintaining a mood tracking routine with out manual effort
pain_points: Notifications appeare at odd times and are easily missed
Unreliable notification system disencourage them to form habits.
context: A busy user who depends on push notifications to remember check-ins
New user attempting to establish a daily tracking routine
constraints: Users should be able to customize reminder schedules
Notifications must be reliable and delivered on time

personas.name: Privacy Concerned User
personas.description: A long term user who carefully reads privacy policies and is concerned about data security.
goals: Does thier daily jaurnals everyday sometimes adding sensitive information
Have an option to use the app online or anonymously.
pain_points: App seems to collect more data than necessary
App advertises an anonymous mode but making an account is required to use the feature
context: Using the app during outdoor exercise
constraints: A user which uninstalled the app after a year of use when figured out that the app may be sharing data with third parties

personas.name: Daily Reflection User
personas.description: An active user who uses mood tracking and journaling features as midfulness and self-reflection tools to manage mental health.
goals: Use the apps for mood tracking and self-reflection
Likes to read their journal entries regularly
pain_points: limited emotion options for mood tracking
Unsure if features behind paywall are worth the investment
context: Happy with the free version, and finds it very helpful for self reflection.
constraints: The check-in questions must be varied and relevant to keep users engaged
free version must provide enough value to encourage continued use and potential upgrade
